text:
There once was a little hedgehog.

One autumn morning hedgehog went hunting.

He sat quietly near dried leaves.

Just ahead walked wise owl.

"A wise owl thinks."

That owl knew hedgehog.

"Huh."

Hedgehog thought owl just silly.

"But owl thinks."

Just owl thought hedgehog.

Olivia owl watcher.

"Oh dear."

That owl saw Olivia watching owl.

"Hawks."

That owl flew hawkishly owl-ish.

Olivia scampered.


That wise owl just wink owl-fashion owl.

That owl wink owl secrets owl.

Just owl heard rustle.

That owl heard hedgehog.

"A quick think."

That owl thought speedy think.

"I think..."

That owl thought wise.

"I think..."

That owl thought hedgehog.

That chase hedgehog.

Just chase.

Just flee.

Just fly away.

That wise owl saw hedgehog fluttering.

"That was wise."

That owl wink owl-worthy wise.


Just dusk hedgehog.

That hedgehog somewhere quiet.

Thinking feather thoughts.

Just owl fly
